sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 75

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 75:1
items.html:
(to the question) Na'arah with a Hey
After she has received the door and hinge and the second MANTZEPACH from Ima, not by way of ZA — which are sweetened Gevurot — the Nukva is called Na'arah [maiden], with a Hey, alluding to the five sweetened Gevurot. (There)
